query_title: Dragon Ball Z: Broly - The Legendary Super Saiyan

recommendations.title: Dragon Ball Z: Broly - Second Coming

recommendations.title: Dragon Ball: The Path to Power
recommendations.overview: A retelling of Dragon Ball's origin with a different take on the meeting of Goku, Bulma, and Kame-Sen'nin. It also retells the Red Ribbon Army story; but this time they find Goku rather than Goku finding them.

recommendations.title: Saint Seiya: The Heated Battle of the Gods
recommendations.overview: Hyoga is missing somewhere in Asgard... When Seiya and the others are looking for him, Athena is kidnapped and they have to rescue her from Dolvar and some mysterious warriors.

recommendations.title: Dragon Ball Z: Fusion Reborn

recommendations.title: Dragon Ball Z: Battle of Gods
recommendations.overview: After the defeat of Majin Buu, a powerful God of Destruction known as Beerus searches for the Saiyan warrior who defeated Frieza. Realizing the threat Beerus poses to Earth, the Z-fighters must stop him. Only Goku, humanity’s last hope, can ascend to

recommendations.title: Saint Seiya: Legend of Crimson Youth
recommendations.overview: The Sun God Abel returns to life, bent on punishing the humans and cleansing Earth from their presence. When Athena joins him, leaving humans to their fate, the Bronze Saints must defend the world in their greatest battle yet.
